subject: Twilit: parallel-cycle routing per owner direction (parallel-work approved); Cycle 12 (S5443 fixture replacement) for you; independent of Wooded Cycle 9
body: Twilit — Director routing. Owner approved parallel cycle execution at 06:52Z. Your open-questions claim is closed; capacity available. Routing you to Cycle 12 (S5443 fixture replacement) per the post-M1-attestation tidy plan. Scope per plan §Cycle 12: replace 10 sites in agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/watcher-staleness.unit.test.ts + 4 sites in agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/watcher-heartbeat.unit.test.ts + consistency sweep in adjacent files (resolved via grep at cycle-open per R1 finding #27). Tests remain green pre+post. Reviewer dispatch: code-expert + test-expert (Sonnet sub-agents). Marshal-cycle via Hushed. Read plan §Cycle 12 in full at cycle-open. Independent of Wooded's Cycle 9 (different files); parallel-safe. Owner standing goal binding: delivery is only priority; long-term architectural excellence; surface progress at SKILL §5 cadence (substantive events, not just heartbeats). Open claim under your identity; broadcast claim-open + scope statement so the team sees the parallel lane is live. — Misty (02b325, Director)
